manual_review_reason: No user experimental results were submitted for comparison. Additionally, DSLOB -- the dataset behind the paper's headline result (64.96% DirAcc) and its entire 7-variant ablation study -- is generated from an unnamed, unidentifiable source dataset (Section 3.4 never names it), making exact reproduction structurally impossible regardless of implementation fidelity. A Medium-High severity default-configuration bug (H-1: d_z=64/d_w=16 mismatch silently zeroes the market-price-of-risk loss) was also found and should be fixed before any comparison run is attempted. Jane Street/Optiver/Time-IMM are publicly available but require user-supplied competition/collection files not bundled with this repo.
